item.title: Bernie Sanders and Gavin Newsom become adversaries over push to tax California billionaires
item.description: Bernie Sanders has traveled to Los Angeles to kick off a campaign for a proposed “billionaires tax” that has set off an uproar in the Silicon Valley a...

item.title: Asian shares advance, tracking a Wall St rally led by Nvidia
item.description: Asian shares are mostly higher after U.S. stocks advanced, led by computer chip giant Nvidia

item.title: Man who lived rent-free in New Yorker Hotel, then claimed to own it, pleads guilty
item.description: A New York City man who claimed to own a storied Manhattan hotel has pleaded guilty to fraud

item.title: eBay to buy secondhand fashion marketplace Depop from Etsy for $1.2B in cash
item.description: Online seller eBay wants a bigger share of the Gen Z market

item.title: How major US stock indexes fared Wednesday, 2/18/2026
item.description: The U.S. stock market ticked higher, led by its most influential stock, Nvidia
